---
title: " "
pagetitle: "Burak Sonmez"
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

### **Book reviews**

*"Competing Responsibilities: The Ethics and Politics of Contemporary Life. 2018. Cultural
Sociology, 12(2), 276–277." [Access the review](https://doi.org/10.1177/1749975518768756)*
